name: python3-ubjson
title: python3-ubjson
summary: Universal Binary JSON encoder/decoder for Python 3
description:
Universal Binary JSON encoder/decoder for Python 3
Universal Binary JSON encoder/decoder based on the draft-12 specification.
It’s meant to behave very much like Python’s built-in JSON module
.
This is the Python 3 package.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-ubjson because Universal Binary JSON encoder/decoder for Python 3.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-ubjson as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-ubjson with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-ubjson --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
